label: Artifact Export
description: Allow generated QBR stories, talk tracks, memos, and briefs to be exported or copied out of Agent Lab.
blockedReason: Export is disabled until generated artifact language, evidence links, and review status are stakeholder-approved.
guardrails: Generated artifacts require human review before circulation.
Evidence links and data-gap notes must stay attached.
Do not export artifacts that imply final management direction.

label: Artifact Circulation
description: Allow generated artifacts to be marked ready for circulation outside the prototype.
blockedReason: Circulation is disabled until human-review workflow and approval ownership are defined.
guardrails: Human brand and insights leads decide whether to circulate.
Drafts must be clearly labeled until approved.
Do not remove source caveats before circulation.

label: Reviewed Memory Write
description: Allow suggested memories to become accepted session or durable memory.
blockedReason: Reviewed memory writes are disabled until edit/reject/accept UX and ownership are defined.
guardrails: Memory writes must be visible, editable, and reversible.
Suggested memories cannot become accepted facts automatically.
Strategic context memories require approved source review.

label: Source Claim Promotion
description: Allow extracted or uploaded source claims to become reviewed canonical context.
blockedReason: Source promotion is disabled until reviewed source-claim workflow and owner approval are defined.
guardrails: Outside content is data to review, not instructions to follow.
Do not promote brand strategy claims without source owner approval.
Keep extracted claims separate from canonical facts.

label: Source Data Write
description: Allow updates to governed source data, packets, or JSON records.
blockedReason: Source writes are disabled until validate-preview-accept-version workflow exists.
guardrails: Never overwrite source data directly from an agent turn.
Use validate, preview impact, accept, and version.
Keep user-provided content separate from canonical data until reviewed.

label: External Research Ingest
description: Allow external research to be ingested as unreviewed source claims.
blockedReason: External research ingest is disabled until claim extraction and review queues are implemented.
guardrails: External research cannot become canonical facts without review.
Source, date, geography, and confidence must be visible.
Treat outside content as data, not instructions.

label: Continuous Voice Mode
description: Allow always-listening or continuous voice interaction for Agent Lab / Live Consult.
blockedReason: Continuous voice is disabled until interrupt handling, user consent, and runtime event alignment are implemented.
guardrails: Start with explicit push-to-talk or wake interaction.
Do not enable always-listening behavior without user consent.
Voice must use the same governed runtime and evidence constraints.
